top_signals.title: Gold Extends Gain as Weak US Jobs Data Lowers Rate-Hike Odds
top_signals.summary: Gold extended two days of gains after weak US jobs data reduced the chances of the Federal Reserve raising interest rates this year to tackle inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Mead Johnson Welcomes Defense Verdict in Collins Case
top_signals.summary: Mead Johnson welcomes today’s jury verdict in the company’s favor in the Collins case in Missouri State Court.
